title: cryptantha pterocarya var. purpusii
intro: Cryptantha pterocarya var. purpusii, also known as Purpus' cryptantha, is a plant species in the borage family that is native to Mexico. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Purpus' cryptantha include the potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
